text.title: Team Charter Working Agreement Decision Tree

decision-tree.root-question: Is this a single scaling-norm decision for a single team, with a named human owner?

branch.question: Are all inputs typed and cited (each has a source field)?

branch.conclusion: Emit the charter using `templates/team-charter-working-agreement.md`. Apply r1-r4 to bound scope, type inputs, name owner, version + last_reviewed.
Block. Add type + source to every input field before emission — untyped inputs let the artefact hallucinate norms.
Split into one charter per team / chapter; never batch unrelated decisions into one artefact.
Block. Resolve ownership to a single person before emission — "team" or "we" is forbidden.

example.p: Team A scaling 6→12 devs, owner=alice (tech-lead), 4 typed inputs cited. → conclusion r5-grounded-in-rationale → emit charter.
